uri.description: Uri of the resource to link

value.description: Value of the region in which the resource will be located. Available regions at present: - ITBG-Bergamo For more information, check the documentation.

LocationDto.description: Contains information about the Region of a resource

enabled.description: Defines whether the job is enabled. Default is true.

scheduleJobType.description: For more information, check the documentation.

scheduleAt.description: Date and time when the job should run. Required only for "OneShot" jobs. For more information, check the documentation.

executeUntil.description: End date until which the job can run. Required only for "Recurring" jobs. For more information, check the documentation.

cron.description: CRON expression that defines the recurrence of the job. For more information, check the documentation.

steps.description: Step that will be executed as part of the scheduled job.

SchedulePropertiesRequestDto.description: Properties required to configure and schedule a job.

enabled.description: Defines whether the job is enabled. Default is true.

scheduleAt.description: Date and time when the job should run. Required only for "OneShot" jobs.

executeUntil.description: End date until which the job can run. Required only for "Recurring" jobs.

cron.description: CRON expression that defines the recurrence of the job.

steps.description: Step that will be executed as part of the scheduled job.

name.description: Descriptive name of the step. For more information, check the documentation.

resourceUri.description: URI of the resource on which the action will be performed.

actionUri.description: URI of the action to execute on the resource. For more information, check the documentation.

httpVerb.description: HTTP verb to be used for the action (e.g., GET, POST, PUT, DELETE). For more information, check the documentation.

body.description: Optional HTTP request body to send with the action. For more information, check the documentation.

dataCenter.description: For more information, check the documentation.
